findings.evidence: `rg` finds the existing general declarations in `TauCeti/.../Chebyshev/Measure.lean`: `normalizedChebyshevT_def` lines 172-174 and `coeFn_normalizedChebyshevTLp` lines 222-225; the norm constants are already `chebyshevTNormSq_zero` lines 67-68 and `chebyshevTNormSq_of_ne_zero` lines 71-73, and Mathlib has `T_zero`/`T_one` in `Mathlib/RingTheory/Polynomial/Chebyshev.lean` lines 125 and 128.
findings.fix: Use `normalizedChebyshevT_def`, `coeFn_normalizedChebyshevTLp`, `chebyshevTNormSq_zero`, `chebyshevTNormSq_of_ne_zero`, and Mathlib's `T_zero`/`T_one` at call sites, or justify why these special-case names are needed beyond the general consumer lemmas.
findings.issue: `normalizedChebyshevT_zero_apply`, `normalizedChebyshevT_one_apply`, `coeFn_normalizedChebyshevTLp_zero`, and `coeFn_normalizedChebyshevTLp_one` are all small rewrites of existing general APIs, so this adds a parallel low-degree API.

summary: The new file adds only low-degree specializations of the existing normalized Chebyshev API, creating parallel names instead of reusing the general declarations.
